title: T-037 — use_by expired manager override service
prompt:
# T-037 — use_by expired manager override

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §12.2, §12.6 (FR-WH-039), V-WH-EXP-006.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`overrideUseByExpiry(lpId, reasonCode, reasonText)` Server Action that allows Manager/Admin to unblock an expired use_by LP with mandatory audit + email notification.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/use-by-override.ts`. RBAC: Manager/Admin only. reasonCode IN ('operational_requirement','quality_secondary_use','disposal_pending','other'); reason_text mandatory. Steps: insert use_by_override_log row {lp_id, manager_user_id, reason_code, reason_text, overridden_at, expiry_until=NOW()+24h}; set LP.status='available' (transition via T-019); send email per 02-SETTINGS EmailConfig; emit outbox 'lp.use_by_override' (deferred T-047).

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/use-by-override.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/use-by-override-log.ts [create]
- packages/db/migrations/0NN_use_by_override_log.sql [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/use-by-override.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a Manager calls overrideUseByExpiry with valid reason_code+text, when service runs, then LP transitions to 'available' and a use_by_override_log row exists.
2. Given an Operator caller, when service runs, then RBAC error returns.
3. Given missing reason_text, when service runs, then V-WH-EXP-006 validation error returns.
4. Given the override completes, when email queue is inspected, then a notification record references the LP and reason.

## Test strategy
- RED: use-by-override.test.ts covers RBAC, missing reason, happy path + email queue assertion.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test use-by-override`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not modify LP.expiry_date.
- Do not skip audit row + email.
- Do not allow Operator role.

pipeline_inputs.description: Manager/Admin use_by override service with audit log + email per V-WH-EXP-006.
pipeline_inputs.details: New use_by_override_log table; expiry_until timestamp; outbox emission deferred T-047.
acceptance_criteria: Given Manager call with valid reason_code+text, when run, then LP transitions to 'available' and use_by_override_log row exists
Given Operator caller, when run, then RBAC error returns
Given missing reason_text, when run, then V-WH-EXP-006 validation error returns
Given override completes, when email queue is inspected, then a notification references the LP and reason
test_strategy: RED: use-by-override.test.ts covers RBAC, missing reason, happy + email queue
risk_red_lines: Do not skip audit row + email
